{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|seo}}
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|infobox}}

''To be written.''
<% if (it.hasStatsSection) { %>
== Stats ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|stats}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasVariantsSection) { %>
== Variants ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|variants}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasLootSection) { %>
== Drops ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|loot}}
<% } -%>

{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|categories}}
